faqs.a: No. Over 60% of our students start with zero experience. Our beginner courses take you from scratch to job-ready.
Yes. All courses are delivered online via live interactive sessions with recordings available for 12 months.
Full refund within 7 days of enrollment, no questions asked.

faqs.q: Do you offer a placement guarantee?
faqs.a: We offer placement assistance with a 91% success rate across 4,200+ students — not a guarantee, but our track record speaks for itself.

faqs.q: Can working professionals manage the schedule?
faqs.a: Yes. Weekend batches and full recording access are specifically designed for working professionals. Most students spend 3–5 hours per week.

faqs.q: Are certifications included in the fee?
faqs.a: Yes. Google Analytics, Google Ads, and Meta Blueprint exam vouchers are included at no extra cost in eligible courses.
Common roles: Performance Marketer, Digital Marketing Executive, Social Media Manager, SEO Executive, Growth Analyst, PPC Specialist.
Yes. Free demo classes every Saturday at 10 AM. You can also book a free 1:1 counseling call anytime.
Yes. Students can upgrade within 6 months at a discounted fee — course fee difference minus 15% loyalty discount.
Yes. Customised corporate programs available. DMI provides L&D reimbursement documentation.
Yes. All courses have zero-cost EMI options. Payments accepted via credit card, debit card, net banking, UPI, Propelld, and Eduvanz.

faqs.q: When does the next batch start?
faqs.a: New batches start on the 1st and 15th of every month. Both weekday and weekend options available.
